description: The Find Parent By Tag node finds a parent object above the instance (Slot) that matches the given Tag (String).

fields.Instance: The slot to scan for parent slots from.
fields.Tag: The tag to look for above Instance (Slot).
fields.SearchDepth:
How far to search for a parent with a tag that matches the given Tag (String).

Examples: 0 > Search immediate parent. 1 > Search parent of slot and it's next parent. -1 > Search all the way to Root (CAN BE HEAVY)
